toolCalls.name: edit

data.content: Now replace all four `DateTime.UtcNow` usages with `_timeProvider.GetUtcNow().DateTime`:

toolCalls.name: edit
toolCalls.args: {"old_str": "            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,\n            ExpiresAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(validDays)", "new_str": "            CreatedAt = _timeProvider.GetUtcNow().DateTime,\n            ExpiresAt = _timeProvider.GetUtcNow().DateTime.AddDays(validDays)", "path": "/tmp/sv-ac1ba56326884b0691e5b04ac82f03f7/fixtures/ready-to-migrate/Services/CouponService.cs"}

data.content:
Done. Here's what changed:

1. Added a `TimeProvider _timeProvider` field and constructor parameter
2. Replaced all 4 `DateTime.UtcNow` calls with `_timeProvider.GetUtcNow().DateTime`

Since `TimeProvider` is already in your DI container, it will be injected automatically. This makes the service fully testable — you can use `FakeTimeProvider` in tests to control the clock.
